title: Chapter 161
content:
Hey there, guys. Sorry for going MIA for so long. I was struck down by a high fever and had to rest for a long time. Let alone writing, just looking at my phone screen was stinging my eyes. It's been two days since my full recovery, and I'm finally well enough to write.

Now, I have missed a few days and a full week. By my count, by the end of this week, I owe you guys 15 chapters. Now I can't give you all the missing chapters at once, so I'll write what I can when I can and will fill fifteen chapters by Sunday. Also, there is one bonus chapter from a review, so that would make it sixteen chapters by Sunday. A lot of work. So let's get into it without further ado. Today there would be five chapters.

~~
